plugins.name: openrig
plugins.description: Drive a running OpenRig rig from any AI client (Claude Desktop/Code, Cursor) via OpenRig's built-in MCP server: build tones, tweak the chain, switch presets. Bundles the openrig-tone-builder skill and auto-wires the MCP server.

plugins.name: ux-ui-mastery
plugins.description: UX/UI design mastery — 19 skills covering NNG heuristics, desktop / mobile / web design, accessibility, component patterns, design systems, and visual hierarchy. Required companion when working on OpenRig's Slint UI.
